text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India, showing a busy road intersection. A white car is in the foreground on the left, and a light blue hatchback is on the right. The background features multi-story buildings, dense green trees, and overhead power lines. A large billboard displaying religious figures (Hindu deities) is visible near the center, along with a yellow banner. Several people are standing near the crosswalk in the middle ground.
